use_cases: Maintains consistent aspect ratios for images and video embeds in responsive layouts
Creates uniform thumbnail grids for product listings or galleries
Wraps embedded content like YouTube videos while preserving 16:9 or custom ratios
Ensures images don't cause layout shifts during loading by reserving space
Provides a clean container for displaying fixed-proportion media assets
ai_summary: A lightweight aspect ratio container component that maintains fixed proportions for media content. Supports custom ratio values (16/9, 4/3, 1/1, etc.) and ensures responsive images or videos scale correctly without distortion. Commonly used for thumbnails, video embeds, and responsive media grids.
